question: List the affiliations shared by more than three city channels.
sql: SELECT Affiliation FROM city_channel GROUP BY Affiliation HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个Affiliation的出现次数，并筛选出出现次数超过3次的Affiliation

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求列出被超过三个城市频道共享的隶属关系，SQL反向翻译描述正确地表达了统计每个Affiliation出现次数并筛选出超过3次的意图。
